items.html: *Know that seven times were appointed for the Nukva [female] of ZA [Zeir Anpin] until she was with him Panim be Panim [face-to-face] and fit for a Zivug [coupling]; and there are still other discernments, which will be clarified in other essays, God willing. These are they: The first is at the time of the first emanation of the Nekudim, before the correction; then she is called a point. The second is at the time of the first Ibur [conception] of the correction of ZA; then she is called Pesia LeVar [a step outward]. The third is at the time of the Yenika [suckling] of ZA; then she already has a name — she is called the last Hey of the name HaVaYaH, and she is also called a rib. The fourth is all the remaining years until she is twelve years and one day old; then she is called a minor, throughout that time, before they are completed in her. Now she is also called Chava [Eve], the wife of Adam HaRishon [the first man]. The fifth is after all twelve years and one day have passed over her, when the Mochin [minds] of her Gadlut [adulthood] have finished entering; then she is called Naar, lacking the Hey. The sixth is at the time she was sawn off from the back of the male, as is known; then she is called Naarah, complete with the Hey. The seventh is when she returns with him Panim be Panim and is fit for a Zivug; then she is called mature.
